items.title: Jim Cramer Says He is “Particularly Fond” of Johnson & Johnson
items.description: Johnson & Johnson (NYSE:JNJ) is one of the stocks Jim Cramer discussed, along with the need for diversification. Cramer highlighted that he is fond of the stock, as he said: “You could own JNJ and Merck with their incredible franchises. You know what? I’m actually particularly fond of JNJ right now. items.title: Best Dividend Aristocrats For December 2025
items.description: The ProShares S&P 500 Dividend Aristocrats ETF (NOBL) has underperformed the SPDR S&P 500 ETF (SPY) year-to-date, but November shows a reversal.

items.title: Dogs Of The Dow Continue Outperforming Broader Market

items.title: Is Intuitive Surgical's Dominance Safe? 10 Years of Healthcare Upside
items.author: Prosper Junior Bakiny
items.description: Intuitive Surgical, a leader in robotic-assisted surgery, faces increasing competition from Medtronic and Johnson & Johnson but is expected to maintain market leadership due to its established technology, large installed base, and growing healthcare market opportunities.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Despite emerging competition, the company has a strong first-mover advantage, extensive installed base, recurring revenue model, and is well-positioned to benefit from aging population and increasing healthcare needs
Developing competing robotic surgery system (Hugo) but seen as a potential market challenger rather than an immediate threat
Developing Ottava robotic surgery system currently in clinical trials, representing potential future competition
